mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-YuanRong SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-YuanRong SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at yuanrong@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-YuanRong SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-YuanRong SIG maintains 13 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-YuanRong.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-YuanRong SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-YuanRong SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Yi Liang, Zhancheng Luo, YuLin Che. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
